memory.summary: My teammate is asking me to take over their part of the project due to a personal conflict, which adds pressure to my already tight afternoon deadline.

goals.description: Finalize and submit my share of the group project

agent.last_reasoning: My high-priority goal is submitting my share by 19:00. Taking the teammate's task now risks missing my deadline due to low energy (6) and stress (4). Messaging them sets a boundary, protecting my primary goal while acknowledging the relationship.
